description_long: This is a modern, boxy house surrounded by lush, flowering trees with dense green and purple foliage. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist white facade, with some wood paneling visible on one side. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with the upper floor set back slightly, creating a small terrace or balcony area. The windows are generously sized, allowing for ample natural light, and are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The main entryway is simple, with a single door and no prominent porch or steps, blending seamlessly into the clean lines of the building. The surrounding landscaping is naturalistic, with trees closely encircling the house, providing privacy and a tranquil atmosphere.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large windows, flat roof, and wood accents, surrounded by dense flowering trees. The design is minimalist and the landscaping is lush and natural.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, large windows, and dense trees encircling the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood paneling, upper terrace, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the back windows and more of the surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, additional wood paneling, and the house nestled among trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist single door with no porch or steps, integrated into the facade
